top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN ym.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN ym.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM yearmonth ym
INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN ym.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM yearmonth ym
INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM yearmonth ym
INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN ym.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM';
